description: Embrace the festive spirit of Christmas with our delightful "Eggnog Season Is Here Recipe" email template. Perfectly crafted for the holiday season, this template captures the essence of traditional food and beverage, offering a delectable recipe for the much-loved eggnog. Use this unique template to promote your seasonal deals, highlighting your offerings in a manner that's as enticing as a cup of creamy, spiced eggnog. An ideal blend of holiday cheer and fashion, this email template is sure to engage your audience, ensuring your promotions are as unforgettable as the holiday season itself. So, gear up for a season of joy, promotions, and a whole lot of eggnog with our exclusive email template.
short_description: Savor the Christmas spirit with our "Eggnog Season Is Here Recipe" email template. Perfect for holiday promotions, offering a delectable eggnog recipe. Blend of holiday cheer & fashion, this template ensures your promotions are unforgettable. Enjoy a season of joy, deals & eggnog with us.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

html_data:
Move over pumpkin spice,

eggnog season is here

 Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetuer adipiscing elit. Aenean commodo ligula eget dolor. Aenean massa. 

 
 

Classic Eggnog Recipe

The BEST Homemade Eggnog recipe! You'll never buy store-bought eggnog again! 

 

Prep time: 5 minutes

Total time: 1 hour

  • 6 large egg yolks
  • 1/2 cup granulated sugar
  • 1 cup heavy whipping cream
  • 2 cups milk
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground nutmeg
  • pinch of salt
  • 1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • ground cinnamon, for topping

Whisk egg yolks and sugar together in a bowl. In a sauce pan, combine all other ingredients and bring to a simmer. Once heated, add milk mixture to eggs one spoonful at a time until fully combined. Refrigerate until chilled and enjoy!

 
See Full Recipe

Do you have a favorite family recipe?

Family recipes often go back many years and hold special stories as they get passed down. We want to feature a few of your family recipes on our blog this month!

 

If you have a family recipe you are willing to share, submit it below. We will be posting the selected recipes to our social media so be sure to give us a follow.

Submit Recipe
 
 

Reader Creations

 

We love seeing all our readers try out new recipes we hand pick for your inbox. If you try a recipe out tag us on social media using #readerrecipes so we can see all of your delicious creations!

 
Submit Your Creations
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

We want a seat at your table.

We believe food is the best way to bring people together. We handpick our recipes so we can earn a seat at your family table.
